documentation.file_docstring: Nostr Profile Import Fetches and verifies kind:0 profile events from relays. Used to import existing profiles before editing.
inline_comments: Sanitize URLs in an imported profile to prevent SSRF attacks. Removes any URLs that don't pass SSRF validation.

Fetch the latest kind:0 profile event for a pubkey from relays. - Queries all relays in parallel - Takes the event with the highest created_at - Verifies the event signature - Parses and returns the profile
Query all relays for kind:0 events from this pubkey
Wait for either all relays to respond or timeout
Find the event with the highest created_at (newest wins for replaceable events)
Sanitize URLs from imported profile to prevent SSRF when auto-merging
Merge imported profile with local profile. Strategy: - For each field, prefer local if set, otherwise use imported - This preserves user customizations while filling in missing data

functions.name: sanitizeProfileUrls
functions.doc: Sanitize URLs in an imported profile to prevent SSRF attacks.   Removes any URLs that don't pass SSRF validation.

functions.name: importProfileFromRelays
functions.doc: Fetch the latest kind:0 profile event for a pubkey from relays.     - Queries all relays in parallel   - Takes the event

functions.name: mergeProfiles
functions.doc: Merge imported profile with local profile.     Strategy:   - For each field, prefer local if set, otherwise use imported

concerns: Multiple concerns detected: database, api, business_logic, auth, logging
